result.reasoning: Metadata label "Document ID:" is informational and not part of the process flow.
Metadata label "HR-SOP-001 Version:" provides document information only.
The value "2.1" is a version number, serving as informational metadata.
Metadata label "Effective Date:" is informational, not an actionable step.
The date "01 March 2026 Document" is a piece of document metadata.
Metadata label "Owner:" indicates responsibility but is informational.
"HR Business Partner" names a role involved in the SOP.
Metadata "Review Cycle: Annual" describes a schedule, not a process step.
